title: Language Change - Houston Screen - Cancel
scenario: User changes language on Poly headset via Device Settings, initiates update, turns off headset during first 20% of update, and taps Cancel on the resulting Houston error screen to return to the home screen.
steps: Open Device Settings on the Poly headset.
Select a new language from the available options.
Tap 'Update Now' to initiate the software update process.
Turn off the headset during the update (safe only during the first 20%).
Observe the Houston error screen that appears with a message about the update not completing.
expected: Tapping "Cancel" returns the user to the home screen for the currently connected device.
